game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Wobbly Life is a vibrant open-world physics sandbox. Play with your friends online or in local co-op, with exciting jobs, mini games and wacky story missions. Earn cash to spend in the world on clothes, vehicles and houses. There is a whole Wobbly World out there to explore!

Grandma has kicked you out into the big wide Wobbly world demanding you go and GET A JOB! She would be so proud if you could earn some money and get your own house one day!

It's time to start earning and living your best Wobbly Life!

  • 1-4 players Online and Local split-screen co-op

  • Open-world sandbox filled with mini-games, toys, secrets

  • +100 unique missions & jobs with exclusive rewards to unlock, alone or with friends

  • +90 vehicles to ride around (and crash)

  • +500 clothes items to show-off in your wobbly look

Let's start exploring! Almost everything is interactive – grab, play, and experiment in a world filled with props, mini-games, and surprises.

Experience the joy solo or share your adventures with up to 4 players in online or local co-op, all in one big Wobbly world.

Embark on story missions, each offering unique rewards through fun puzzles and challenges. Unveil the mysteries of the tropical island, uncover the mountain’s secrets, delve into hidden caves...

The Wobbly Museum has lost all its artifacts! Maybe you can help? Buy treasure maps and solve clues to find all the Museums' lost treasures and unlock exciting rewards.

Make grandma happy and go get that job! Earn money by choosing from +20 exciting jobs, each bringing their new unique challenges. From pizza delivery to firefighting, taxi driver to disco dancer… your Wobbly dream job is waiting for you.

The Wobbly Space Programme is looking for new recruits. Space is a whole new open world, with new jobs, missions, and secrets to uncover. You'll even get to fly your own spaceships too, so what are you waiting for!

Once you’ve fattened up your bank account why not go on a shopping spree? Visit the Pet Shop to buy a faithful companion, buy and unlock +500 clothes items and choose from +90 different vehicles.

When you’ve really made the big bucks, you can even buy a house: from a wooden cabin to a huge fancy mansion, Wobbly Island has a home for everyone!

Want to take a break from Wobbly Island? Try out Arcade mode! Discover new game modes: Trash Zone, Hide & Seek, Wobble Run and Sandbox. Each have customizable settings for you to play with, multiple mini-games and new areas to have fun in!

Create your own Wobbly Life Content and share it with players across the world in the Steam Workshop. Prefer to explore rather than create? Dive into an ever-growing library of creative wonders from our Wobbly community.
game_info.description: Welcome to Wobbly World! You're a wobbly character exploring a vibrant island filled with jobs, collectibles, and adventures. Your goal is to earn money by completing delivery jobs, collect special items scattered across the island, and unlock new areas. Navigate through the physics-based world, deliver packages to customers, and gather enough treasures to win! Watch out for obstacles and manage your wobbly momentum as you explore this colorful sandbox world.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your wobbly character (Left/Right/Up/Down)
Space: Jump (hold for higher jump)
Z: Interact/Pick up packages and items
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to main menu)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. This test validates that the player can move around the world, interact with objects, and navigate the environment without getting stuck.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI will move the player in all directions, test jumping mechanics, and attempt to interact with various objects in the world including packages and collectibles. It will explore different areas of the map.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should successfully move in all directions, jump consistently, and interact with objects. The test is successful if the player can navigate at least 50% of the map without collision issues and can pick up at least one item.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test - Complete all deliveries and collect treasures. This test implements an optimal strategy to complete the game by delivering all packages and collecting enough treasures to trigger the win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI will prioritize picking up packages, navigating to delivery locations efficiently, and collecting treasures along the way. It will use pathfinding to reach objectives and avoid obstacles, utilizing sprint when needed for speed.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the player delivers all required packages (at least 3) and collects the target number of treasures (at least 5), triggering the GAME_OVER_WIN state within a reasonable time frame.

TEST_3.test_description: Job completion efficiency test. This test focuses on completing delivery jobs as quickly as possible to validate the job system and reward mechanics.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI will focus exclusively on package delivery, taking the most direct routes to customers, using sprint consistently, and minimizing unnecessary exploration. It will test the job completion and money earning systems.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test succeeds if the player completes at least 5 deliveries, earns money for each successful delivery, and the score increases appropriately. The delivery system should work without errors.

TEST_3.expected: The test succeeds if the player completes at least 5 deliveries, earns money for each successful delivery, and the score increases appropriately. The delivery system should work without errors.

TEST_4.test_description: Treasure collection and exploration test. This validates the collectible system and world exploration mechanics by focusing on finding and collecting scattered treasures.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The AI will systematically explore the entire map, searching for treasure items while ignoring delivery jobs. It will test the collision detection for collectibles and the inventory/score update systems.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the player collects at least 8 treasures, explores all accessible areas, and the treasure count updates correctly. No treasures should be uncollectable due to positioning errors.
